history.content: Completed. I logged task completion with a full `task_complete` note and finalized the proposal execution. ### What was done - **Modified:** `[REDACTED-HE].md` - **Created/Deleted:** none ### Key updates in the skill - Added **explicit trigger metadata** for clearer auto-routing. - Added **precedence guidance** to define when this skill should be selected instead of `browser-automation-playbook`. - Added **routing boundaries** clarifying when to route to `web-scraper` (extraction/research flows) versus this X-focused interaction playbook. ### Result Skill routing is now more deterministic, with clearer boundaries between overlapping browser skills and reduced ambiguity in selection.
